source_notes: Low-rise residential candidate seeded from the repo-local Toronto parcel source. Promote only after manual verification of parcel linkage, full zoning string, and frontage/depth coverage.
Neighbourhood residential candidate for address-to-parcel and deterministic zoning checks. Confirm the full zone string and any site-specific exceptions before promotion.
Low-rise candidate intended to catch address normalization and parcel lookup regressions. Verify dimensions and active zoning assignment count before treating as a release benchmark.
Low-rise parcel candidate sampled from the Toronto property-boundaries seed file. Manually verify the parcel address, base zone category, and any missing parcel metrics before promotion.
Apartment-neighbourhood candidate intended for parcel-to-zoning analysis and review-warning checks. Confirm the full zone string, height permissions, and any overlay warnings before promotion.
Apartment / multi-unit area candidate for zoning and policy-stack resolution. Promote only after a manual check of the governing by-law sections and any review-trigger warnings.
Residential parcel candidate sampled for broader benchmark coverage outside the downtown core. Verify parcel linkage, zone assignment count, and any parcel-data gaps before promotion.
Main-street corridor candidate for mixed-use zoning and policy-stack validation. Confirm the full zoning string, any commercial/residential density split, and overlay presence before promotion.
Avenue corridor candidate intended to exercise address lookup, zoning parsing, and parcel-level policy retrieval on a likely mixed-use frontage.
Avenue / corridor candidate for future verified checks of main-street zoning and document applicability. Confirm parcel linkage and zone detail against the Toronto zoning source before promotion.
Downtown parcel candidate intended to surface richer zoning strings, policy coverage, and review-needed warnings once manually verified.
Central-city candidate for future parcel-to-zoning and policy-stack verification. Promote only after confirming the parcel address, zoning string, and any exception or overlay conditions.
Employment-area candidate sampled from the parcel source to keep the benchmark set from being entirely residential. Verify the parcel linkage, zone family, and policy coverage before promotion.

Employment / edge-area candidate intended to catch differences in parcel resolution and zoning coverage outside the central city. Confirm the governing zoning and any overlay constraints before promotion.
Outer-area parcel candidate for broader address and zoning coverage. Promote only after manual verification of parcel linkage, active zoning assignment, and any policy applicability.
